AMD.reasoning: TREND ASSESSMENT: AMD is in a strong, confirmed uptrend. Daily EMA alignment is clean: 10 EMA (316.48) > 21 EMA (285.88) > 50 EMA (251.69). ADX is 74.94 with +DI at 55.37 vs -DI at 10.1 — one of the strongest trend readings possible, well above the required 25 threshold. Hourly EMAs are also aligned (ema_24 > ema_48 > ema_120), confirming multi-timeframe trend integrity. Higher highs and higher lows are intact in recent price action. MOMENTUM ASSESSMENT: Momentum is clearly accelerating on the daily timeframe. ROC metrics are all positive and strongly expanding: 5d=+16.1%, 10d=+27.4%, 21d=+74.26%. MACD histogram is +7.02 with the MACD line (33.24) well above its signal (26.22), confirming momentum is accelerating, not fading. Daily volume bias is up, OBV is trending up without price divergence, and relative volume is 1.05x average. Wiki context from the prior run (Apr 17) noted AMD had the highest raw momentum in the watchlist at 41.7% 21d ROC — today's 74.26% confirms the move has continued and accelerated. ENTRY CONSTRAINT — OVEREXTENSION: Despite the bullish trend and momentum, current price ($354.49) is 12% above the 10 EMA and 24% above the 21 EMA. The daily Z-score vs 50-period is 2.6, Bollinger %B is 0.929, and RSI 14 is 83.06 — all indicating the price is significantly extended from ideal pullback entry zones. Per strategy rules, entry requires a pullback to the 10 or 21 EMA. Chasing at current levels would violate risk discipline. The hourly ADX is only 17.25 (weak trend on hourly), and hourly MACD histogram is near-flat (0.084), suggesting the short-term momentum is consolidating — consistent with a near-term pause before potential continuation. ENTRY PLAN: Wait for a pullback to the 10 EMA zone (~316-320), which has confluence with the daily Fib 23.6% retracement at 316.70 and the hourly Fib 50% at 332.48 as a nearer intermediate zone. The macro regime (AI hardware thematic intact, Fed on hold) supports the trend continuing. Confidence is moderated from a raw bullish read because the immediate setup requires patience — no valid entry at current price levels.
